title: carlina atlantica
intro: Carlina atlantica, also known as the Atlantic hawk's beard, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Carlina atlantica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carlina atlantica typically involve the use of the plant's root or leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
